content: I am a fourth year PhD student in Economics at the University of Iowa. My research interests include Econometrics and Empirical Industrial Organization. In particular, I am interested in semi-parametric and non-parametric models with endogeneity, unobserved heterogeneity, and quantile regression. I am interested in the econometric applications in the literature on auctions and estimating firm-level productivity.

title: Justin Doty
